reviews.review_description: Kind of like a spot the difference game, but some objects have no difference. No objects have any interaction which I was disappointed by- didnt think there was much use of VR in general, could have just as easily been a flatscreen game. Maybe good for kids, but wasn't for me unfortunately.
Honestly, I really enjoyed this game, it is pretty fun. There are a lot of unexpected and funny items you can play with;)
Works great on the Quest 2 but on the Quest 1 the computer screen on the desk does not show the item. I tried uninstalling and reinstalling still the same problem.

I really like the game - it's something new:) It somehow makes me challenged but relaxed at the same time;) I like that you don't need to move around a lot (cause thise games make me dizzy) - you just sit at your oldschool pawn shop desk and the whole gameplay is within reach of your hands. 
I also enjoyed the extra mini game with throwing the basketball through the loop (still can't make it haha;D)
